description_for_human: Security Copilot plugin for SpyCloud darknet intelligence. Investigate credential exposures, infostealer infections, and compromised identities across Sentinel, Defender XDR, Intune, and Entra ID.
description_for_model:
SpyCloud Threat Intelligence plugin suite for Microsoft Security Copilot. This solution connects to both the SpyCloud REST API and Microsoft Sentinel Log Analytics to provide deep investigation capabilities across dark web credential exposure, infostealer malware infections, compromised corporate and consumer identities, device forensics, stolen session cookies, and identity risk posture. The solution spans 3 integrated plugins:

1. KQL Plugin (90 skills): Queries 10 custom Sentinel tables (SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL, SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL, SpyCloudCompassData_CL, SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL, SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL, SpyCloudSipCookies_CL, SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL, SpyCloudInvestigations_CL, Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL, SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL) covering user investigation, password analysis, breach catalog, Compass consumer identity, UEBA correlation, Fusion multistage detection, cross-connector threat hunting, risk scoring, executive reporting, and automated remediation audit.

2. API Plugin (20 skills): Direct REST API access to SpyCloud Enterprise Breach, Compass Investigation, Identity Exposure, Session Identity Protection (SIP), and Investigations APIs for real-time lookups by email, domain, IP, username, or password.

3. Investigation Agent (17 sub-agents): Autonomous conversational agent orchestrating specialized sub-agents for UEBA behavioral analysis, Fusion multistage attack correlation, TI enrichment & IOC analysis, session cookie & MFA bypass detection, lateral movement tracking, data exfiltration detection, executive summary & compliance reporting, watchlist management, ransomware impact assessment, identity risk scoring, supply chain exposure analysis, dark web monitoring, Defender XDR endpoint analysis, Intune device compliance, CASB cloud app security, and Compass deep infostealer forensics.

The solution integrates with 49 analytics rules, 28 hunting queries, 10 automated remediation playbooks, 3 workbooks, 3 Jupyter notebooks, 4 watchlists, and UEBA/Fusion detection across Microsoft Sentinel.

plugins.name: SpyCloud KQL Plugin
plugins.description: Queries 6 custom SpyCloud tables in Microsoft Sentinel for credential exposure investigation, password analysis, breach catalog, device forensics, remediation audit, and executive reporting.

plugins.name: SpyCloud API Plugin
plugins.auth: API Key (Bearer token via Authorization header)
plugins.description: Direct REST API access to SpyCloud for real-time darknet intelligence lookups without requiring Sentinel data ingestion.

plugins.name: SpyCloud Investigation Agent
plugins.auth: None (uses Sentinel workspace connection; optional SpyCloud API key for API-backed skills)
plugins.description: Autonomous conversational investigation agent that orchestrates 17 specialized sub-agents, 6 GPT-4o AI analysis skills, and 35 KQL data retrieval skills for comprehensive darknet threat intelligence investigation across Microsoft Sentinel, Defender XDR, Intune, Entra ID, and CASB. The GPT-4o analysis skills provide AI-powered threat narrative construction, compliance assessment, executive briefing generation, external threat intel correlation, and custom response playbook design.

sub_agents.description: Monitors dark web exposure trends and generates alerts

sub_agents.description: Checks Intune device compliance for infected endpoints

sub_agents.description: Discovers cloud app risk, OAuth abuse, and shadow IT from compromised credentials

sub_agents.name: CompassDeepInvestigationAgent
sub_agents.description: Deep infostealer forensics - stolen cookies, browser data, crypto wallets, C2 infrastructure

ai_analysis_skills.name: AnalyzeAndSummarize
ai_analysis_skills.description: Synthesizes raw KQL data into structured investigation reports with threat assessment, risk scoring, and remediation recommendations

ai_analysis_skills.name: BuildThreatNarrative
ai_analysis_skills.description: Constructs chronological attack narratives from multi-source data with MITRE ATT&CK mapping and kill chain analysis across SpyCloud, Defender, Intune, Entra, and CASB

ai_analysis_skills.name: GenerateComplianceAssessment
ai_analysis_skills.description: Assesses exposure against GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOX, and NIST frameworks with notification obligations and audit-ready documentation

ai_analysis_skills.name: GenerateExecutiveBriefing
ai_analysis_skills.description: Transforms technical findings into board-level executive briefings with business impact, risk quantification, and automation ROI metrics

ai_analysis_skills.name: CorrelateExternalThreatIntel
ai_analysis_skills.description: Enriches SpyCloud IOCs with malware family analysis, threat actor attribution, C2 infrastructure patterns, and actionable blocking recommendations

ai_analysis_skills.name: DesignResponsePlaybook
ai_analysis_skills.description: Designs custom incident response playbooks with decision trees, API call specifications, escalation criteria, and Logic App integration guidance

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
custom_tables.description: Enterprise Breach API watchlist - compromised credentials, PII, device forensics, passwords, infostealer artifacts

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
custom_tables.description: Breach catalog metadata - title, description, category, record counts, confidence scores, malware family

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassData_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass deep infostealer records - stolen cookies, browser autofill, crypto wallets, installed software, C2 infrastructure

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass infected device fingerprints - hostname, OS, IPs, infection timeline, application counts

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass application targets - URLs, domains, credential/cookie counts per infected machine

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudSipCookies_CL
custom_tables.description: Stolen session cookies by domain - cookie name/value/expiration, secure/httpOnly flags, infection context

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL
custom_tables.description: Identity exposure profiles - deduplicated credential risk posture per identity with severity scoring

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudInvestigations_CL
custom_tables.description: Investigations API - full database searches across breaches, infostealers, phishing, paste sites, combo lists

custom_tables.name: Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
custom_tables.description: MDE remediation audit log - device isolation, tagging, IOC actions (internal, not API-sourced)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
custom_tables.description: CA remediation audit log - password resets, session revocations, CA group assignments (internal, not API-sourced)

setup_instructions:
## Security Copilot Plugin Installation

This solution includes 3 plugins for Microsoft Security Copilot. Upload the YAML files directly — do NOT upload this manifest.json to Security Copilot.

### Step 1: Install the KQL Plugin
1. In Security Copilot, go to **Sources** > **Manage plugins** > **Custom** > **Add plugin**
2. Select **Upload a file** and upload `SpyCloud_Plugin.yaml`
3. Configure required settings: TenantId, SubscriptionId, ResourceGroupName, WorkspaceName
4. This provides 90 KQL-based investigation skills querying your Sentinel workspace

### Step 2: Install the API Plugin
1. In Security Copilot, go to **Sources** > **Manage plugins** > **Custom** > **Add plugin**
2. Select **Upload a file** and upload `SpyCloud_API_Plugin.yaml`
3. When prompted for authentication settings, enter your SpyCloud API key as the **Value** field. The plugin sends it as the `X-API-Key` header automatically.
4. If asked for **AuthScheme**: leave blank or enter empty string. If asked for **Location**: enter `Header`. If asked for **Key**: enter `X-API-Key`.
5. This provides 20 real-time API skills for direct SpyCloud lookups

### Step 3: Install the Investigation Agent
1. In Security Copilot, go to **Sources** > **Manage plugins** > **Custom** > **Add plugin**
2. Select **Upload a file** and upload `SpyCloud_Agent.yaml`
3. Configure required settings: TenantId, SubscriptionId, ResourceGroupName, WorkspaceName
4. Optionally provide SpyCloud API key for API-backed sub-agent skills
5. This provides an autonomous investigation agent with 17 specialized sub-agents

### Step 4: Deploy Sentinel Infrastructure
Click the Deploy to Azure button in the README or use the ARM template/Terraform module to deploy:
- 6 custom Log Analytics tables
- Data collection endpoint and rules
- 49 analytics rules
- 28 hunting queries
- 10 automated playbooks
- 3 workbooks
- 4 watchlists
- UEBA and Fusion detection

### Required Permissions
- **KQL Plugin**: Reader access to the Sentinel Log Analytics workspace
- **API Plugin**: Valid SpyCloud API key (Enterprise or Enterprise+ tier)
- **Agent**: Reader access to Sentinel workspace + optional SpyCloud API key
- **Playbooks**: Managed identity permissions for Microsoft Graph, MDE, and Sentinel APIs

### Post-Deployment
Run `scripts/post-deploy-auto.sh` to automatically configure RBAC, managed identity permissions, and validate the deployment. Or use `scripts/deploy-wizard.sh` for an interactive guided setup.
